title: cenia hispida
intro: Cenia hispida, also known as the desert ironwood or ironwood tree, is a small, evergreen tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues, such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cenia hispida include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make a range of medicinal products, including salves, ointments, and capsules.
